value: always-run-e2e-with-device: When the EP-133 device is connected and running unit tests, always also run e2e tests. Use: python3 -m pytest tests/unit/ tests/e2e/ -m 'not e2e or e2e' to override the default e2e exclusion. The device being connected is the trigger — don't ask, just include them.

cmd-byte-is-session-id: The [cmd] byte (position 6 in SysEx) is a session identifier, NOT a fixed opcode. Device echoes it back with -0x40 offset in responses. Official TE app uses rotating IDs (0x60-0x6A range), our tool uses 0x7E. All values work. sniffer-upload21.jsonl also uses 0x7E — captured from either TE app in a different session or our older code. captures/sniffer-upload-kick-official.jsonl (official TE app, slot 97) is the definitive reference.

session-2026-03-21-captures: Two debug captures collected this session. (1) tui-2026-03-21-205217: clean session — upload + rename worked, no failures. (2) tui-2026-03-21-210118: broken session — waveform precalc blocked worker for 14min, throughput collapsed 10x after file picker, upload never executed. Both captures are untracked (captures/ gitignored) but available locally for analysis.
Textual 8.x: app.suspend() is @contextmanager (sync), NOT @asynccontextmanager. Use 'with app.suspend():' not 'async with app.suspend():'. Mocks need __enter__/__exit__, not __aenter__/__aexit__.

Textual TextArea (read_only=True, can_focus=False) works as a selectable log pane. can_focus=False prevents focus theft and keybinding interception (TextArea has backspace binding that fires even in read_only=True, consuming events before App). Set via subclass: class _LogView(TextArea, can_focus=False). Also call DataTable.focus() in on_mount explicitly.

tui-waveform-precalc-broken: Waveform precalc is severely broken (confirmed from capture tui-2026-03-21-210118). Three P0 issues: (1) ko2-tools-n8x: hardcoded timeouts in _initialize(), (2) ko2-tools-36z: precalc blocks worker thread — user upload sat in queue 14 minutes and never executed, app had to be force-killed, (3) ko2-tools-zlp: MIDI throughput drops 10x mid-session (230-400 pages/s → 24-37 pages/s), coincides with file picker but causation unclear. Also ko2-tools-qqc (P1): investigate how official TE app renders waveforms — may not need full download.

verify-payload-format: VERIFY wire payload is 3 bytes: [0x0B][target_hi][target_lo]. NO sub byte. Fixed in commit 53ccc08 — the old sub=0x00 field consumed the high byte of the target. Worked by accident for slots <256 but would break for >=256. Tested across all slot ranges on real device.
